nasb.text: Then the Kohathites set out, carrying the holy objects; and the tabernacle was set up before their arrival.

esv.text: Then the Kohathites set out, carrying the holy things, and the tabernacle was set up before their arrival.

cnv.text: 哥轄人抬著聖物起行；他們到達之前，人已經把帳幕豎立起來。

ccb.text: 随后出发的是哥辖人，他们抬着圣物前行。在他们到达之前，圣幕应已支好。
